Configuration for Git submodules used in the pebble-firmware project.

# Purpose
The file defines a list of Git submodules used in a software project. Each submodule is specified with a unique name, a local path where the submodule's content will be stored, and a URL pointing to the remote repository. The submodules include various third-party libraries and components, such as CMSIS, STM32 SDK, Mynewt Nimble, and FreeRTOS Kernel, among others. These submodules are integrated into the project to provide additional functionality and resources, allowing the main project to leverage external codebases. The configuration ensures that the correct versions of these dependencies are retrieved and placed in the specified directories within the project's structure.
